{{Quote|A true Hunter is willing to risssk their own life in the pursuit of dangerous prey. Tusk Cats are a worthy adversary.|The Trandoshan [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Charr]]|<ref name="SWH">''[[Star Wars: Hunters]]''</ref>}}
'''Tusk-cats''',<ref name="EV" /> also spelled as '''Tusk Cats''',<ref name="SWH" /> were [[Sentience|non-sentient]] [[Diet|carnivorous]] [[feline]]s found on the [[grass]]lands of the [[planet]] [[Naboo]]. They used the [[grass]] as cover when [[hunting]] herbivores.<ref name="EV" /> They had a long muscular tail and pair of tusks growing from their lower jaws. Despite their fierceness, they could be used as mounts.<ref name="SWGA" />
